# cnc-ddraw runtime

Source: <https://github.com/FunkyFr3sh/cnc-ddraw>

These files were copied from the maintainer's local cnc-ddraw distribution on
2026-07-16. They are redistributed under the accompanying MIT license.

| File | SHA-256 |
| --- | --- |
| `ddraw.dll` | `85e0f7d530dfda134793a57cb3e76b0287dcc96892ee57162dd68f47283b03a9` |
| `ddraw.ini` | `2571322a64a767022627ed076f9539179eff322efa336016e8af1f2337cc8fcb` |
| `cnc-ddraw config.exe` | `e21131cca40be055b9cf728ed822474f2560793635fc323127b63ba9a838d5d6` |

The `Shaders/` directory comes from the same distribution. The redundant
`shader-package.zip` archive is intentionally omitted.
